---
name: New Vendor / GPU Recipe Request
about: Request a recipe for a GPU family not yet covered
labels: vendor-request
---

## GPU Family

- **Vendor**: (Intel / NVIDIA / AMD)
- **Family / Architecture**: (e.g. DG2 Alchemist, Battlemage, Blackwell Pro, Blackwell GeForce, Ada, Navi 31, RDNA 4)
- **Specific models**: (e.g. Arc B580, RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell, RX 7900 XTX)
- **Driver branch (if NVIDIA)**: (Game Ready / Studio / RTX Enterprise)
- **Vendor:Device IDs from `lspci -nn`**: (e.g. `10de:2684`)

## Why This Vendor?

<!-- What makes this non-trivial? Known driver quirk, Code-43-style lockout, reset-bug, etc. -->

## What You've Tried

<!-- If you're trying this yourself, share what works and what breaks. Even failed attempts are useful. -->

## Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] I'm requesting because I want to use it (no contribution planned)
- [ ] I'd contribute a PR once I've run it for 2+ weeks in production
- [ ] I can provide test-setup access to a maintainer
